title: Emerging Growth Research Releases Flash Report on DIAGNOS, Highlighting Regulatory Catalysts and Commercialization Potential for CARA AI Platform

title: Model uses real image to train AI to look for fakes
description: Nathan Jacobs’ lab at WashU tackles detecting AI-generated images with the real thing. The post Model uses real image to train AI to look for fakes appeared first on The Source .

title: After filing for its IPO, Anthropic says AI should slow down. Fat chance.
description: No sooner did Anthropic file for its initial public offering of stock this week than it then put out a missive suggesting that AI model makers need to slow down to let us catch our breath — or else AI can improve itself so fast that human society won’t be able to handle the results. [...] The post After filing for its IPO, Anthropic says AI should slow down. Fat chance. appeared first on SiliconANGLE .

title: AI Literacy Is Not Prompt Literacy. Ann Handley Says It’s Judgment Literacy
description: Marketing expert Ann Handley reframes AI literacy as judgment literacy, emphasizing when to avoid AI rather than perfect prompts. The post AI Literacy Is Not Prompt Literacy. Ann Handley Says It’s Judgment Literacy appeared first on Search Engine Journal .

title: AI Could Soon Use More Water Than Humanity Drinks, UN Report Warns
